competitors.raw_snapshot: 全部Tier1/2/官方页直连均403，转WebSearch。baseline（7/1）曾记录Cascade EOL'原定7/1'但找不到'已执行'的确认性原文，措辞均为预告性质。本次（7/2，EOL日期已过）多篇独立二手信源改用现在时/既成事实语气描述：'Cascade is end-of-life on July 1, 2026, and the local agent that powered Windsurf must be repointed to Devin Local before that hard deadline'；'There is no grace period, no soft deprecation with warnings, and no extended support tier'。同时新增细节：Devin Local可生成subagents（'specialized sub-sessions that handle specific parts of a task in parallel before reporting back'），号称比Cascade节省最多30% token。仍未能拿到官方changelog原文（403），故标注来源为WebSearch二手信源。
competitors.content_hash: 全部Tier1/2/官方页直连均403，转WebSearch。baseline（7/1）曾记录Cascade EOL'原定7/1'但找不到'已执行'的确认性原文，措辞均为预告性质。本次（7/2

changes.description: Cascade EOL（原定7/1）日期已过，多篇独立二手信源的描述从baseline时的预告性语气转为现在时既成事实语气，且新增细节：Devin Local为硬性切换（无宽限期），可生成subagent并行处理子任务，声称比Cascade节省最多30% token
changes.evidence: 「Cascade is end-of-life on July 1, 2026, and the local agent that powered Windsurf must be repointed to Devin Local before that hard deadline」「There is no grace period, no soft deprecation with warnings, and no extended support tier」
changes.source_url: WebSearch聚合（byteiota.com、webdeveloper.com等转述，官方changelog本次仍403未能直接验证）

key_findings: Cascade EOL（7/1）日期已过，多个独立二手信源的措辞从baseline时的'预告性/计划中'转为现在时'既成事实'描述，硬性切换，无宽限期
Devin Local新增subagent并行子任务能力，声称比Cascade节省最多30% token，但这是AI-to-AI的任务并行，非人机session同构
官方changelog/andrew.ooo文章页本次仍403，未能获得一手原文确认EOL执行时间戳

competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
fetched_urls: https://hn.algolia.com/api/v1/search?query=Anthropic+Claude+new+feature+release&tags=story&hitsPerPage=8 (403)
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anthropics/claude-code/main/CHANGELOG.md (ok, primary source)
WebSearch: Anthropic Claude new feature announcement July 1 2026 OR July 2 2026 (ok)
WebSearch: "Claude Managed Agents" session-level overrides vault injection webhook announcement date (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: 一手抓取claude-code GitHub CHANGELOG.md成功：版本从baseline的v2.1.197升至v2.1.198。新增：Claude in Chrome正式GA；新增background agent通知（Notification hook，事件类型agent_needs_input/agent_completed）；background agents完成代码工作后自动commit/push/开draft PR；Explore agent继承主session模型（原为haiku，现封顶opus）；subagent与context compaction继承主session的extended thinking配置；修复agent teams（掉线队友上报状态、卡住队友收到消息后唤醒）；focus mode下subagent活动汇总进合并通知计数。另经WebSearch确认Claude Developer Platform同期扩展Managed Agents：新增session-level overrides（可对单次session替换model/system prompt/tools/MCP servers/skills）、vault凭证注入位置控制、更广的webhook覆盖（agent/deployment/deployment run生命周期）。
competitors.content_hash: 一手抓取claude-code GitHub CHANGELOG.md成功：版本从baseline的v2.1.197升至v2.1.198。新增：Claude in Chrome正式GA；新增background agen

changes.description: Claude Code新增background agent通知机制：Notification hook区分agent_needs_input（需要人介入）与agent_completed（已完成）两种事件，且focus mode下subagent活动会折叠进统一通知计数
changes.evidence: 「Added background agent notifications with Notification hook (agent_needs_input / agent_completed)」「Improved focus mode: subagents appear in activity summary; notifications fold into count」
changes.meee2_relevance: 触及锚点5（peripheral层：不切焦点、以戳的方式获知session状态）——这是Anthropic自己的产品把'AI快session需要人介入/已完成'做成后台通知信号，与meee2'菜单栏5字戳任何session'的peripheral定位在功能意图上高度接近，但落地形式仍是IDE内hook通知而非独立菜单栏峰值交互层

changes.description: subagent与context compaction继承主session的extended thinking配置；agent teams修复队友状态上报与唤醒逻辑；Managed Agents平台新增session-level overrides，可对单次session替换model/工具/skills等配置
changes.evidence: 「Subagents and context compaction inherit session's extended thinking configuration」「Fixed agent teams: failed teammate reports status; stuck teammate wakes on message」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：session级配置在agent层级间传递/覆盖，与meee2'同一协议下session同构'的抽象方向接近，但这里传递的是模型配置而非'人=慢session'本身，暂判定为间接信号而非直接90%重叠

key_findings: 官方CHANGELOG.md一手确认版本升级：v2.1.197 → v2.1.198
background agent通知（agent_needs_input/agent_completed）是本次最值得关注的信号，功能意图上贴近meee2的peripheral/戳交互差异化锚点
Managed Agents平台同期扩展session-level overrides、vault注入、webhook覆盖，进一步强化'AI agent作为可配置session单元'的产品方向

alerts.headline: Claude Code v2.1.198新增background agent通知机制（agent_needs_input / agent_completed），功能意图贴近meee2的peripheral戳通知定位
alerts.evidence: 「Added background agent notifications with Notification hook (agent_needs_input / agent_completed)」「Improved focus mode: subagents appear in activity summary; notifications fold into count」
alerts.action_suggestion: 跟踪该通知机制是否会从IDE内hook扩展为独立于编辑器焦点的peripheral层交互（如菜单栏/系统通知），若扩展则与meee2锚点5的重叠度将从'意图接近'升级为'结构重叠'，建议持续观察后续版本是否引入脱离IDE的独立通知面板
